scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:render: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
